description_long: Beautiful kitchen garden, bakery, café and restaurant focused on seasonal produce, wood-fired sourdough and farm-to-table dining near Oxford.
notes: One of Oxfordshire's best modern farm dining destinations

name: Worton Kitchen Garden
description_short: Kitchen garden, bakery and farm shop
description_long: Beautiful farm-to-table destination combining bakery, produce shop, café and seasonal dining.

name: Wykham Park Farm Shop
description_long: Popular Oxfordshire farm shop offering local produce, artisan foods, butchery, deli and café dining.

name: Yarnton Home & Garden
description_long: Large independent garden centre offering plants, interiors, gifts and dining near Oxford.

name: Zayka
description_long: Modern Turkish and Mediterranean restaurant serving grilled dishes and mezze.
notes: Popular breakfast, lunch, dinner and afternoon tea destination inside Bicester Village
